description: This file defines a main React component for the application's page, including state management, lifecycle hooks, and rendering of child components like sidebar, topbar, note list, note editor, and settings modal. It handles user interactions, API calls, and UI updates for the note-taking application.

methods.name: refreshTags
methods.description: Fetches the list of tags from the backend and updates the local state.

methods.name: refreshNotes
methods.description: Fetches the list of notes based on current filters and updates local state; maintains selected note validity.

methods.name: scheduleAutosave
methods.description: Sets a debounce timer to save note changes automatically with visual feedback on save status.

methods.name: onNewNote
methods.description: Creates a new untitled note and sets it as the selected note.

methods.name: onDelete
methods.description: Deletes a note by ID and updates the selected note state.

methods.name: onTogglePinned
methods.description: Toggles the pinned status of a note and updates it.

methods.name: onCreateTag
methods.description: Creates a new tag and refreshes the tag list.

methods.name: onDeleteTag
methods.description: Deletes a tag, updates active tag filter, and refreshes tags and notes.
